_comment: Authoritative machine config for the loop. Mirrors project.md prose; this file wins on conflict.

discovery._source_options: local-goals (files in .sdlc/goals/) | github (issues labelled sdlc:goal, needs the gh CLI)

project._comment: Mirror issue status onto a GitHub Projects v2 board (needs the gh `project` scope). Flow: Backlog -> In Progress -> QC -> Done, Blocked for parked. Fail-open: if it can't, the loop still runs on issues+labels.

knowledge_graph._scope_options: full (code + external research + internal analysis) | research (skip code; internal analysis + external research only)
